footer.tagline: Agricultural excellence at the heart of Ivory Coast.

home.title: Home — Palme Ivoire
home.welcome: Premium Crude Palm Oil & Palm Kernel Oil Producer in Ivory Coast
home.subtitle: From plantation to export, we produce world-class crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel oil (PKO) — combining Malaysian expertise, environmental sustainability, and a lasting commitment to local communities.

services.label: Our products and services
services.subtitle: From responsible sourcing to high-quality processing, we master the entire value chain.

items.title: Premium Crude Palm Oil (CPO)
items.desc: Extraction and processing of high-quality crude palm oil, compliant with international standards. Ecological treatment process with natural fluid recovery.

items.title: Palm Kernel Oil (PKO)
items.desc: World-class palm kernel oil for food, cosmetic, and pharmaceutical applications. Exceptional quality recognized internationally.

items.title: Partnership with local producers
items.desc: Support and technical guidance for regional producers. We purchase their harvest, guide them, and help them improve yields and practices.

items.title: Sustainable practices & responsible processing
items.desc: Committed to environmental sustainability. Our treatment fluids are naturally processed and our processes protect biodiversity.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: PALME IVOIRE - Excellence in Palm Oil Processing
about.body: PALME IVOIRE is a processor and producer of crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel oil (PKO) based in the heart of Ivory Coast. Benefiting from expertise acquired from Malaysian industry leaders, we apply innovative technologies to ensure efficiency and consistency in our operations. We work in close partnership with local producers, creating a sustainable value chain that benefits our communities.

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: Every drop of oil we produce meets the most stringent quality standards. Our processes guarantee unmatched purity and excellence.

items.title: Sustainability & Innovation
items.desc: Our processing practices respect the environment. We naturally process our fluids and apply innovative technologies to minimize our carbon footprint.

items.title: Solidarity & Community
items.desc: We invest in local communities through education, healthcare, and economic opportunities. Our success depends on the well-being of our partner producers.

items.title: Malaysian Expertise
items.desc: Technology and know-how acquired from industry leaders in Malaysia

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: CPO and PKO complying with the strictest international standards

items.title: Sustainable Processing
items.desc: Treatment fluids naturally processed in our facilities

items.title: Local Partnership
items.desc: Direct support to 1500+ palm producers in the region

items.text: PALME IVOIRE offers us the best prices and technical support. Their team helps us improve our production. It's a true partnership, not just a business relationship.
items.author: Kofi Mensah

items.text: The quality of their CPO and PKO is exceptional. Our international customers are very satisfied. PALME IVOIRE has become our trusted supplier.
items.author: Sophie Bernard

items.text: Their commitment to sustainability and responsible fluid treatment is remarkable. It's rare to find in Africa a company that truly cares about the environment.
items.author: Dr. Amara Sow
